Wiki / Levels & activities

Progression & activities

Levels gate the game's systems; contracts, goals, events, and power-ups keep the empire moving and reward you for staying active.

XP

Leveling & XP

Almost every action earns XP. Your player level is driven by lifetime XP, so spending XP on research or training never lowers it. Each level-up also pays a cash reward.

XP per action

Manual blend3
Auto blend1
Hire employee5
Buy shop8
Buy upgrade10
Unlock flavor18
Unlock country30
Achievement12
Money milestone35

Level unlocks

Lv 1Flavor unlocking
Lv 3Shop extensions
Lv 5Employees
Lv 6Research lab
Lv 7Shake price control
Lv 8Special upgrades · contracts
Lv 10Wage management
Lv 15Global expansion
Catering

Contracts & orders

From Level 8, catering contracts appear periodically (up to 3 active). Hit the blend target before the deadline for a cash + XP payout; the cash scales with your current income rate.

ContractTargetRewardXPTime
Birthday Party Catering30 blends3×608 min
School Fair Booth50 blends4×9010 min
Wedding Reception100 blends7×18012 min
Corporate Event150 blends8×22012 min
Food Festival Booth250 blends14×38015 min
Stadium Concession400 blends20×55015 min

Catering Expertise research boosts contract rewards by up to +50%. Save a power-up for big contracts to blast through the target.

Daily play

Goals & power-ups

Goals

5 daily goals (reset every 24 h) and 3 hourly goals (reset every 60 min), generated by a seeded RNG so they're stable within each window. Rewards are XP, money, or a temporary income buff. Turn on Auto-Claim Goals to collect them automatically.

Power-ups

Sugar Rush×2 · 3 min
Blender Fury×3 · 5 min
Employee Overtime×4 · 10 min
Lucky Batch×5 · 2 min

Buy, stock, and activate; buffs stack multiplicatively.

Surprises

Events & the Chronicle

As you play, events pop up — some ask you to make a call, others resolve on their own. Every one is recorded so you can look back on it.

Choice events

You pick how to respond. Examples include an Equipment Fire Sale (grab a discounted upgrade), a Tax Inspection (pay up or gamble on the fine), a Viral Marketing opportunity (invest for a boost), and Blender Repairs. Your decision is logged.

Auto-events

These resolve on their own — a banner shows the active effect (good or bad) and clears itself when the effect ends. No action needed; just ride it out or enjoy the boost.

VIP customers

A VIP requests a combo you've already unlocked. Fill the order within about 90 seconds for a cash bonus plus a ×2 income buff for two minutes — a great moment to also fire a power-up.

Featured combo

Every 50 game-days a combo is spotlighted for a +30% income bonus while featured — keep its flavors loaded to cash in. See Flavors & combos.

The Event Chronicle

A running log (newest first) of the events you've seen, the choices you made, and how they turned out — opened from the blender area. Your total choice- and auto-event counts also appear in Stats.

Bigger rewards

The Crisis Management research node raises the cash you earn from events by up to +30%, so it's worth leveling if events come up often for you.

Calendar

Seasonal specials

Four real-world events each unlock a flavor + combo for a limited time — then keep them forever.

EventFlavorComboWindowBonus
ValentineRose CreamLove PotionFeb 10–16+25%
SummerTropical MangoSummer RushJun 19–25+25%
HalloweenPumpkin SpiceHaunted HarvestOct 25–Nov 1+30%
ChristmasCandy CaneWinter WondershakeDec 20–27+30%
What's new

New in v1.3

Two major additions expand the progression loop beyond levels and daily goals.

  • Prestige ("Rebrand") — the game's first meta-progression reset. Reach Level 20 and hold the tier's cash cost to rebrand: your money, shops, upgrades, flavors, countries, and staff wipe, but you keep a permanent income multiplier (+25% per prestige) and earn prestige tokens to spend on Eternal upgrades. See Prestige.
  • Daily Special flavor + login streak — a new daily engagement system that rewards returning players with a rotating special flavor and streak bonuses. See Daily Special.
